title: timonius corneri var. penangianus
intro: Timonius corneri var. penangianus, also known as Penang Timonius, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to Malaysia and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Timonius corneri var. penangianus are often boiled or made into tea to harness its medicinal properties.
